records.question: Which addresses in the district of Huanuco have the postal code 32515 and were last updated on 2006-02-15 04:45:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
WHERE address.postal_code = '32515' AND address.last_update = '2006-02-15 04:45:30' AND address.district = 'Huanuco'
records.pred_sql: SELECT address.address_id FROM address WHERE address.district = 'Huanuco' AND address.postal_code = '32515' AND address.last_update = '2006-02-15 04:45:30'

records.question: Which addresses exactly at 771 Yaound Manor have the postal code 86768?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
JOIN country ON city.country_id = country.country_id
WHERE address.postal_code = '86768' AND address.address = '771 Yaound Manor'
records.pred_sql: SELECT address_id FROM address WHERE address = '771 Yaound Manor' AND postal_code = '86768'

records.question: Which addresses exactly at 1214 Hanoi Way in Nebraska have the phone number 491001136577 and are in cities updated on or after 2006-02-15 04:45:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE address.phone = '491001136577' AND city.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:25' AND address.district = 'Nebraska' AND address.address = '1214 Hanoi Way'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.address_id FROM address AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.city_id WHERE T1.address = '1214 Hanoi Way' AND T1.district = 'Nebraska' AND T1.phone = '491001136577' AND T2.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:25'

records.question: Which addresses in Okayama with postal code 87212 and address 1404 Taguig Drive have been updated since 2006-02-15 04:45:30, belong to active customers named ISBELL with email FREDERICK.ISBELL@sakilacustomer.org, and are in cities last updated on 2006-02-15 04:45:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
JOIN customer ON address.address_id = customer.address_id
WHERE customer.active = 1 AND customer.email = 'FREDERICK.ISBELL@sakilacustomer.org' AND city.last_update = '2006-02-15 04:45:25' AND customer.last_name = 'ISBELL' AND address.postal_code = '87212' AND address.address = '1404 Taguig Drive' AND address.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:30' AND address.district = 'Okayama'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.address_id FROM address AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.city_id INNER JOIN customer AS T3 ON T1.address_id = T3.address_id WHERE T1.district = 'Okayama' AND T1.postal_code = '87212' AND T1.address = '1404 Taguig Drive' AND T1.last_update > '2006-02-15 04:45:30' AND T3.active = TRUE AND T3.last_name = 'ISBELL' AND T3.first_name = 'FREDERICK' AND T3.email = 'FREDERICK.ISBELL@sakilacustomer.org' AND T2.last_update = '2006-02-15 04:45:25'

records.question: Which addresses exactly at 1789 Saint-Denis Parkway with phone 936806643983 and postal code 8268 are in Coahuila de Zaragoza, updated on or after 2006-02-15 04:45:30, and located in Acua city updated at most 2006-02-15 04:45:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
WHERE address.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:30' AND address.address = '1789 Saint-Denis Parkway' AND address.phone = '936806643983' AND address.postal_code = '8268' AND city.city = 'Acua' AND city.last_update <= '2006-02-15 04:45:25' AND address.district = 'Coahuila de Zaragoza'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.address_id FROM address AS T1 INNER JOIN city AS T2 ON T1.city_id = T2.city_id INNER JOIN country AS T3 ON T2.country_id = T3.country_id WHERE T1.address = '1789 Saint-Denis Parkway' AND T1.phone = '936806643983' AND T1.postal_code = '8268' AND T3.country = 'Coahuila de Zaragoza' AND T1.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:30' AND T2.city = 'Acua' AND T2.last_update <= '2006-02-15 04:45:25'

records.question: Where is the address exactly at 1923 Stara Zagora Lane in Nantou with postal code 95179, located in Taiwan whose country was last updated on 2006-02-15 04:44:00 and city updated on or after 2006-02-15 04:45:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT address.address_id FROM address
JOIN city ON address.city_id = city.city_id
JOIN country ON city.country_id = country.country_id
WHERE address.postal_code = '95179' AND country.last_update = '2006-02-15 04:44:00' AND country.country = 'Taiwan' AND city.last_update >= '2006-02-15 04:45:25' AND address.address = '1923 Stara Zagora Lane' AND address.district = 'Nantou'
